assertions.title: Auto-pair excludes already-selected and excluded columns

steps.action: Select key id on File A and File B, then click Auto-pair from File A
steps.expected: Key columns appear once as prefix in comparison selection with no duplicates
steps.observed: Preview showed exactly: 1 id → id, 2 name → full_name, 3 email → email_address (no duplicate id pair)

evidence.network: Auto-pair action completed in UI; resulting preview order verified

assertions.title: Save pair order triggers a file download

steps.expected: Download is triggered and payload parses with version/headers_a/headers_b/selection
steps.observed: Download captured (440 bytes), parsed JSON contains version, headers_a, headers_b, selection

assertions.title: Load pair order populates selection when headers match

steps.action: Change comparison selection, then load saved valid pair-order file
steps.expected: HTTP 200 and selection updates to saved selection
steps.observed: HTTP 200 returned; selection restored to id→id, name→full_name, email→email_address

assertions.title: Load pair order with mismatched headers shows error

steps.expected: HTTP 400 with mismatch message; selection unchanged
steps.observed: HTTP 400 with 'Saved pair order does not match the currently loaded File B columns'; preview remained unchanged

evidence.network: POST /api/sessions/773e9ee0-1188-42ef-b18a-6e80128edf3a/pair-order/load -> 400 {"code":"bad_input","error":"Saved pair order does not match the currently loaded File B columns"}

assertions.title: Load pair order with unknown version fails

steps.observed: HTTP 400 returned, but message was parse error: 'Failed to parse pair-order file: invalid value: integer `999`, expected u8 at line 2 column 16'

evidence.network: POST /api/sessions/773e9ee0-1188-42ef-b18a-6e80128edf3a/pair-order/load -> 400 {"code":"parse","error":"Failed to parse pair-order file: invalid value: integer `999`, expected u8 at line 2 column 16"}

assertions.issues: Error text does not match contract expectation for unknown-version handling.

assertions.title: Normalization checkboxes reflect and mutate state

steps.action: Toggle all normalization checkboxes and run comparison
steps.expected: Compare request body reflects exact checkbox states
steps.observed: Compare payload showed treat_empty_as_null=false, null_token_case_insensitive=false, case_insensitive=true, trim_whitespace=true, date_normalization.enabled=true

steps.action: Set null token input to 'null, NA, unknown' and run comparison

evidence.network: POST /api/sessions/773e9ee0-1188-42ef-b18a-6e80128edf3a/compare -> 200 (request body contains parsed null_tokens array)

steps.action: Set advanced date formats to two lines and run comparison

evidence.network: POST /api/sessions/773e9ee0-1188-42ef-b18a-6e80128edf3a/compare -> 200 (request body contains two-line date formats)

assertions.title: Compare with mismatched key counts returns 400

steps.action: Select key_columns_a=[id,name], key_columns_b=[id], then Run Comparison
steps.expected: 400 citing both File A and File B labels and UI banner shows message
steps.observed: 400 returned with 'Key columns for File A and Key columns for File B must contain the same number of columns (got 2 and 1)' and banner displayed same text

evidence.network: POST /api/sessions/773e9ee0-1188-42ef-b18a-6e80128edf3a/compare -> 400 {"code":"validation","error":"Key columns for File A and Key columns for File B must contain the same number of columns (got 2 and 1)"}

assertions.title: Compare with non-existent key column returns 400 (MissingColumns)

steps.action: Scripted compare request with key_columns_a including does_not_exist
steps.expected: 400 naming missing column and selection label
steps.observed: 400 returned: 'Key columns for File A reference missing columns: does_not_exist'

evidence.network: POST /api/sessions/773e9ee0-1188-42ef-b18a-6e80128edf3a/compare -> 400 {"code":"validation","error":"Key columns for File A reference missing columns: does_not_exist"}

assertions.title: Compare with duplicate key columns returns 400 (DuplicateColumns)

steps.observed: 400 returned: 'Key columns for File A contain duplicate columns: id'

evidence.network: POST /api/sessions/773e9ee0-1188-42ef-b18a-6e80128edf3a/compare -> 400 {"code":"validation","error":"Key columns for File A contain duplicate columns: id"}

assertions.title: Back to file selection preserves selection and normalization

steps.action: With custom selections and normalization set, click Back to file selection then Continue to configuration
steps.expected: Pair order, checkbox states, null token input, and date formats remain unchanged
steps.observed: Before and after values matched: pairs (id→id, name→full_name, email→email_address), checkboxes [false,false,true,true,true], null tokens 'null, NA, unknown', date formats '%Y/%m/%d\n%Y.%m.%d'

evidence.network: No additional compare request required; DOM state diff before/after navigation matched

frictions.description: Drop-zone buttons are div role=button elements; agent-browser upload works only on underlying file input selectors, which have dynamic ids.
frictions.resolution: Targeted input[type=file] / discovered ids via DOM inspection and uploaded fixtures directly.

frictions.description: Advanced date patterns require true multiline input; simple key-press sequence did not insert newline in this environment.
frictions.resolution: Used multiline fill payload via command substitution to provide exact two-line textarea content.

summary: Tested 12 assertions (VAL-MAP-013..024): 11 passed, 1 failed. Failure: VAL-MAP-017 returned a parse error string instead of the expected 'Unsupported pair-order file version' message.
